title: PA squares up to ANC in Ward 3
description: KNYSNA NEWS – Two big guns, the ANC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS – Two big guns, the ANC and the PA, will be facing each other in Knysna’s Ward 3 by-election set for 20 August.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS – Two big guns, the ANC and the PA, will be facing each other in Knysna’s Ward 3 by-election set for 20 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is going to be a direct contest between sitting PA councillor Beauty Charlie, who lives in the ward, and the ANC’s Lukhanyiso Lohana, part of the ANC’s community structures and Youth League."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two smaller parties, the AUF (which polled 2,37% in the 2021 local government elections) and the Land Party, a new entrant, have also fielded candidates.","html":"Two smaller parties, the AUF (which polled 2,37% in the 2021 local government elections) and the Land Party, a new entrant, have also fielded candidates."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In 2021 the ANC polled 65% of the vote, while the PA got 8%.","html":"In 2021 the ANC polled 65% of the vote, while the PA got 8%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The PA enters the by-election fray after a significant showing in the recent Ward 8 by-election, won by former Knysna mayor Aubrey Tsengwa. It made significant inroads into the ANC’s support by cutting the ANC’s majority from 72.36% in the 2021 local government elections to 52.12% in the by-election.","html":"The PA enters the by-election fray after a significant showing in the recent Ward 8 by-election, won by former Knysna mayor Aubrey Tsengwa. It made significant inroads into the ANC’s support by cutting the ANC’s majority from 72.36% in the 2021 local government elections to 52.12% in the by-election."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Balance of power","html":"Balance of power"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are pleased to share with you that Councillor Beauty Charlie will be our candidate for the by-election in Ward 3. This is her home ward and we are confident of an exceptional outcome” said PA secretary general Chinelle Stevens.","html":"“We are pleased to share with you that Councillor Beauty Charlie will be our candidate for the by-election in Ward 3. This is her home ward and we are confident of an exceptional outcome” said PA secretary general Chinelle Stevens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Land Party candidate Sakhiwo Vincent Malahlalana. Photo: Supplied","html":"Land Party candidate Sakhiwo Vincent Malahlalana. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ward 3 includes Nekkies and was previously represented by Speaker Mncedisi Skosana until his removal from office by Western Cape local government MEC Anton Bredell . It followed a probe into the code of conduct of councillors relating to the illegal payments to political appointees.","html":"Ward 3 includes Nekkies and was previously represented by Speaker Mncedisi Skosana until his removal from office by Western Cape local government MEC Anton Bredell . It followed a probe into the code of conduct of councillors relating to the illegal payments to political appointees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"AUF candidate Mandlenkosi Cyprian Ndlovu. Photo: Supplied","html":"AUF candidate Mandlenkosi Cyprian Ndlovu. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now the PA is stepping up its fight, part of a new strategy .","html":"Now the PA is stepping up its fight, part of a new strategy ."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ryan Smith, the DA’s constituency head for Knysna said the party will not contest the ward.","html":"Ryan Smith, the DA’s constituency head for Knysna said the party will not contest the ward."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Ward 3 is a safe ANC seat and will not change the balance of power in the Knysna council, so we are focusing all our resources on election 2026,” said Smith.","html":"“Ward 3 is a safe ANC seat and will not change the balance of power in the Knysna council, so we are focusing all our resources on election 2026,” said Smith."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The EFF and KIM also said they will not contest the by-election.","html":"The EFF and KIM also said they will not contest the by-election."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
